name: politifinder-us-election-records
title: U.S. Election Records — PolitiFinder
description: The most striking records in U.S. election history (biggest landslides, closest races, most votes, presidents who won while losing the popular vote, youngest/oldest senators, and more), across President, U.S. Senate, U.S. House, and Governor. One row per record entry; names and public URLs only. Compiled by PolitiFinder (137 Finder LLC).

fields.name: record
fields.description: The record category, e.g. 'Biggest presidential landslides'.

fields.name: detail
fields.description: Short context, e.g. 'def. James M. Cox' or 'Minnesota · def. Norm Coleman'.

fields.name: year
fields.description: Election year; blank for career records.

fields.name: url
fields.description: The public PolitiFinder page for that record or candidate.
